title: Add Billing and Subscription Link to Settings
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want a Billing & Subscription link in the settings section that opens the Stripe billing portal, so that I can quickly manage my subscription and payment details.
description:
## Context

Users need a way to access their billing and subscription management directly from the DataTools Pro settings.

## Behavior

Add a new link labeled "Billing & Subscription" in the settings section of the application. When clicked, the link opens the Stripe billing portal (billing.stripe.com) in a new browser tab, where the user can manage their subscription, update payment methods, and view invoices.
acceptance_criteria: A 'Billing & Subscription' link appears in the settings section
Clicking the link opens the Stripe billing portal in a new browser tab
The link points to the correct Stripe customer portal URL
ux_changes: Adds a 'Billing & Subscription' navigation link to the settings section that opens the Stripe billing portal in a new tab.
implementation_notes: Initial implementation uses a static Stripe portal URL. Future iterations may dynamically generate a session-specific portal link.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed feature was added and pushed to staging with a screenshot of the settings section.
